Solver theory
=============

Attenuation
-----------

.. math::
   :label: fixture-attenuation

   \psi_\text{out} = \psi_\text{in} \cdot \exp(-\Sigma_t L / \mu)

Balance
-------

.. math::
   :label: fixture-balance

   L + A = Q

k-effective
-----------

.. math::
   :label: fixture-keff

   k = \nu\Sigma_f / \Sigma_a
